series_metadata.series_description: Record series includes inspection reports filed by agency contract inspectors on specifically assigned licensed home medical equipment providers (includes full inspection report filed, correspondence generated by the agency to document deficient standards, documentation filed by licensee to address deficient standards and agency''s response letter to final inspection).

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: licensed provider is re-surveyed and final inspection findings report is filed or two years expiration date of license, which ever occurs first
